extract: Magneton (Japanese: レアコイル Rarecoil) is a dual-type Electric/Steel Pokémon introduced in Generation I. Prior to Generation II, it was a pure Electric-type Pokémon. It evolves from Magnemite starting at level 30 and evolves into Magnezone when leveled up in a special magnetic field or when exposed to a Thunder Stone. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) The Paradox Pokémon Sandy Shocks is said to be an ancient relative of Magneton or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
